message:
fix(reliability): prevent NaN propagation and memory leaks

- format-stars.ts: Return 0 instead of NaN for invalid input in
  parseStarCount to prevent NaN propagation in consuming code
- AgentHeroCard.tsx: Add proper setTimeout cleanup on unmount and
  before setting new timeout to prevent memory leaks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
